For HVAC, Roofing & Plumbing Companies

Your marketing is spending money.
Find out if it's booking jobs.

Most HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies spend $5K–$15K a month and can't tell you which dollar produced a booked job. We can show you that in writing, in 7 days, without a single call.

Start Here
Revenue Leak Audit
$750
Delivered in 7 business days · No calls required · Everything in writing

You've been writing checks every month. Your agency sends reports you can't connect to booked jobs. We'll show you the real picture, benchmarked against your top competitors, with every gap turned into an annual dollar figure.

Sample findings for a $2.3M HVAC company
Phone answer rate66%, losing ~$84K/yr
Google Ads trackingNot installed, $4,200/mo blind
Estimate follow-upNone, 68% of quotes go cold
Google reviews4.8 stars · 127 reviews
Total annual leakage$247,000 identified
  • Google Business Profile benchmarked against 5–7 top competitors in your market
  • Every marketing channel assessed: which ones are booking jobs, which are burning cash
  • Phone system analysis: answer rate, booking rate, revenue leaking through missed calls
  • Website conversion audit: mobile speed, phone number placement, trust signals, CTAs
  • Every gap translated into annual revenue impact, not "needs improvement," but specific dollars
  • Prioritized action list: what to fix first, what it's worth, who does it
Start My Audit
📐
Then Build the System · Most Popular
Growth System Blueprint
$3,000
2–3 week delivery · Includes full audit · No calls required

Most owners who get an audit know exactly what needs fixing, but 90 days later nothing has changed because there's no time to build the system. The blueprint is that system, already built. Scripts written. Sequences built. Dashboard set up. Your office manager runs it Monday.

  • Full Revenue Leak Audit included, everything in the $750 engagement
  • Word-for-word phone script for your front desk, handles pricing questions, tire kickers, the works
  • 5-touch estimate follow-up sequence by text and email, recovers $40K–$80K/year for most shops
  • Weekly dashboard: cost per booked job by channel, built in Google Sheets, takes 10 minutes
  • Channel strategy: exactly where to move budget, with a 90-day reallocation plan
  • 90-day implementation calendar with specific weekly actions, no guesswork
  • 5–8 ready-to-use templates: scripts, sequences, tracking sheets
Apply for a Blueprint
🤝
Then Improve It
90-Day Growth Advisory
$7,500
12-week engagement · Includes audit + blueprint · No calls required

Building the system is one thing. Making it work in your actual business, with your team, your market, and your busy season, is another. The advisory is for owners who want someone reviewing what's happening every week and telling them exactly what to adjust.

Weeks 1–2Audit + Blueprint delivered. Quick wins identified and handed off.
Weeks 3–4First changes implemented. Phone script live. Tracking dashboard running.
Weeks 5–8Weekly written review: what's working, what to adjust, what to stop.
Weeks 9–12Measuring, iterating, monthly competitor re-benchmarking.
On exitBefore/after in dollars. 6-month roadmap. Everything documented.
  • Full audit + blueprint in week 1, so you're not waiting 12 weeks to start
  • Weekly written performance review: numbers, interpretation, specific next action
  • Questions answered in writing within 24–48 hours, every week for 90 days
  • Monthly competitor re-benchmarking to track the gap closing in real time
  • Exit report showing exactly what changed, in dollars, over the full 90 days
Apply for Advisory
Why This Is Different

Independent. No ad spend incentive.
No retainers.

We don't run your ads, manage campaigns, or take commissions on what you spend. Our only product is the analysis, which means our only incentive is getting it right. That's a different thing from what an agency offers.

🚫
Not a marketing agency
Agencies earn more when you spend more on ads. We don't run ads, don't manage campaigns, and have zero financial incentive to recommend more spend. We're the independent check on whether your agency is actually performing.
📋
Fixed scope, clear deliverables
No monthly retainers. No mastermind programs. No "ongoing strategy fees." You pay for a specific deliverable - a 15–25 page written report - and you own it completely. You know exactly what you're getting before you pay.
💵
Every finding in dollars
Not "your phone answer rate needs improvement." But "at your call volume and average ticket, your answer rate is costing you approximately $84,000/year in missed revenue." We don't report metrics - we report money.
Common Questions

Everything you want to
know before you apply.

Straight answers. No sales language.

No - and that's intentional. Everything happens in writing. You fill out a short application, we confirm details by email, send an invoice, and start research. You get a documented report you can read at your own pace, share with your office manager, and act on without sitting through a presentation. No Zoom, no phone calls, no slide decks.
Every finding comes with a specific action: what to do, who does it, how long it takes, and what it's worth if you fix it. Most fixes don't require an agency or technical skills. The most common ones - fixing your Google Business Profile, setting up a review request system, training a phone script - can be done by you or your office manager in a few hours. This is designed for operators, not marketing teams.
Agencies manage campaigns and earn more when you spend more on ads. We don't run ads, don't take retainers, and have zero financial incentive to recommend more spend. We're the independent check on whether your agency is actually performing - with specific data points you can use to hold them accountable. Many clients use our audit to benchmark their agency's performance and have hard conversations about what they're actually getting.
Even better. The audit will show you whether your agency is performing or underperforming - with the specific numbers to prove it. Most owners who get an audit discover their agency is tracking the wrong metrics and missing the ones that connect to actual booked jobs. You'll leave knowing exactly what to ask your agency for, and whether their answer is acceptable.
HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies doing $1M–$5M in annual revenue, spending at least $3,000/month on marketing. If you're earlier stage, the five free tools are built for exactly your situation - start there and come back when you're ready.
The average audit identifies $100K–$400K in annual revenue leakage. The most common sources: missed calls, underperforming Google presence vs. competitors, and zero follow-up on estimates that went cold. Fixing even one of those typically pays for the audit 20–50x in the first year. The question isn't whether the math works - it's whether you'll act on what you find.
Just fill out the short application: company name, location, website, and what you're trying to figure out. We confirm within 24 hours and send an invoice. Once paid, research starts immediately. We don't need logins, internal data, or access to your accounts - everything we analyze comes from public information and industry benchmarks.
Ready to get started?

Find out what your marketing is actually producing.

Fill out the short application. We'll review your details and get back to you within 24 hours - in writing. No calls, no pitch, no obligation until you decide to move forward.
